---
mode: agent
description: Compile the TVL library (six VHDL-2008 files in dependency order)
---

Read [../../agent-references/compile-tvl.md](../../agent-references/compile-tvl.md) and execute the documented sequence from the repo root. After completion, list the contents of `tvl_lib/workdir/` to confirm `TVL-obj08.cf` and the `.o` files exist, then report success or the offending file/line if any analyze step failed.
